_comment: Win-rate acceptance band for scripts/selfplay.mjs --check. Content changes must keep the simulated win rate inside [min,max] and strictly beatable (>0) and survivable (<1). Regenerate the observed numbers with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 500

observed.note: TARGETED-REBALANCE (2026-07-14): eased the global realm-scaling exponent in lj.enemy.base (js/enemy.js) from 0.40 to 0.375 — realmMod = (1 + exp)^(size-1), the single most load-bearing balance knob. WHY: the win rate had drifted to the LOW band edge (~28.4%, only ~3.4pt over the 25% floor — fragile). Per-realm selfplay diagnostics showed realms 5-7 own nearly every win and death, ~70%+ of losses are boss attrition, and HALF of all boss deaths landed with the boss already under 20% HP (median 19.7% left): the hero loses razor-thin, a hair short on damage. A sweep was clean and monotonic (0.40->28%, 0.39->31.5%, 0.385->34%, 0.38->37%, 0.375->~38%). Chose the exponent over a hero-base buff because hero GEAR is unscaled (items default to itemLevel 1) while enemies scale with depth, so a flat hero buff mostly eases realm 1-3 (~0 deaths) — the exponent's effect is inherently back-loaded to the deep realms where the game is decided, and it eases the compounding armor/HP the tier comments call the depth villain, while preserving every tier's RELATIVE step (all families scale by the same factor; at size 1 the exponent is inert so realm 1 is byte-identical). RESULT: shipped --check reads 39.1% (2344/6000) at 6000 runs [and 37.2% at 5000] — IN-BAND, beatable+survivable, boss deaths still the dominant loss mode (2619 boss vs 1037 room, ~72%) so the challenging identity is preserved; deeps avg ~realm 6.8 (deepest 10). Roughly quadruples the floor margin (3.4->~14pt) yet stays sub-40% and far from the 75% ceiling — a restrained recenter, not an overshoot. STRUCTURAL gate green (26,400 rooms across all biomes); headless dist/index.html render sweep across realms 1-8 (all biomes + families + boss grades B/T) painted with zero console errors. CARRIED-FORWARD GOTCHA: gScore (combat.js) sums all stats equally, so armor/defense-heavy loot auto-equips over equal-scored offense and DILUTES boss-attrition wins — keep new loot offense/HP-first. This exponent is now the primary difficulty lever; adjust it (not per-tier stats) for future global rebalances. Regenerate with: node scripts/selfplay.mjs --runs 6000 --check
